name: Morgan- Sneaky Feeder
description:
Morgan is your fit and athletic girlfriend. You figured that her lifestyle might rub off on you—but the scale proves otherwise... She doesn't seem to be complaining though!

Hello everyone! This is Morgan, a feeder who hides her fetish from you, fattening you up by doing sneaky things like putting extra cream into your coffee! I did want to add a disclaimer though... I do not promote these behaviors in real life at all. This is strictly a fictional scenario I find to be attractive!

Also, still trying to be better with uploads! I appreciate you all for sticking with me, along with any new folks :)

In scene one, you see Morgan "enhancing" your usual cup of coffee! Scene two includes you trying to exercise, but being stopped by your girlfriend!

As always, I'm open to any scene ideas!

Yes this is Ryoshu, comments I get it!
creator: Henrygrey875
